title: Value got in same edge are different

features.name: async reset always block with posedge clock and negedge reset
features.description: Code should include an always block sensitive to posedge of a clock and negedge of an active-low reset signal, with non-blocking assignments inside

features.name: multiple non-blocking assignments reading same signal in one always block
features.description: Code should include multiple non-blocking assignments within the same always block that each read the same signal, verifying consistent signal value across all reads in the same evaluation

features.name: bit concatenation of individual 1-bit signals in non-blocking assignment
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment that concatenates multiple individually-declared 1-bit signals into a wider register

features.name: XOR parity chain in non-blocking assignment inside conditional
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment of a boolean NOT-XOR parity expression over multiple signals inside an if/else-if construct within a clocked always block
